# SDP - Service Desk — action docs

One page per action of the [`sdp-service-desk`](../README.md) connector: every parameter explained, plus copy-paste `input_data` variations. These pages are the targets of each operation's **Learn more** link (`externalDocs` + the description suffix in the definition).

| Action | Operation ID | Endpoint | Doc |
|---|---|---|---|

| Create change | `CreateChange` | `POST /api/v3/changes` | [create-change.md](create-change.md) |
| Create problem | `CreateProblem` | `POST /api/v3/problems` | [create-problem.md](create-problem.md) |
| Create request | `CreateRequest` | `POST /api/v3/requests` | [create-request.md](create-request.md) |
| Create solution | `CreateSolution` | `POST /api/v3/solutions` | [create-solution.md](create-solution.md) |
